evals.name: single-blank-tone-rewrite
evals.prompt: Convert this Coursiv prompt exercise into the Markdown format we use for exercise notes: /Users/lairimia/VSCode/claude-code-skills/tmp/400pq.png and /Users/lairimia/VSCode/claude-code-skills/tmp/400pa.png
evals.expected_output: See /Users/lairimia/VSCode/claude-code-skills/tmp/400.md for the target shape. Note: that reference file's option order does not match the screenshot's visual tray order (it matches final-prompt usage order instead) — per user decision, the skill preserves visual order, so the option list legitimately differs from this file. Everything else (title, instruction, placeholders, final prompt, AI response) should match.

evals.name: four-blanks-long-response
evals.prompt: Convert this Coursiv prompt exercise into the Markdown format we use for exercise notes: /Users/lairimia/VSCode/claude-code-skills/tmp/410pq.png and /Users/lairimia/VSCode/claude-code-skills/tmp/410pa.png
evals.expected_output: See /Users/lairimia/VSCode/claude-code-skills/tmp/410.md — same option-order caveat as eval 0 applies. Also a good check for a long, multi-section AI response (headings + bullets) transcribed faithfully.
